sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import PageBorder from '../components/PageBorder'; import './Page.css'; import './Events.css'; const EVENTS = [ { date: 'APR 12', year: '2025', title: 'Spring Equinox Retreat', type: 'retreat', location: 'Blue Ridge Mountains, VA', desc: 'A three-day immersive retreat exploring movement, breathwork, and stillness. Limited to 20 participants.', }, { date: 'APR 26', year: '2025', title: 'Shakti Flow Workshop', type: 'workshop', location: 'Studio — Main Hall', desc: 'A two-hour exploration of fluid movement and feminine energy. All levels welcome.', }, { date: 'MAY 03', year: '2025', title: 'Strength & Stillness', type: 'workshop', location: 'Studio — Main Hall', desc: 'Balancing dynamic strength training with meditative stillness. Bring a mat.', }, { date: 'MAY 17', year: '2025', title: 'Community Night', type: 'community', location: 'Studio — Courtyard', desc: 'An open evening of movement, music, and conversation. Free for all members.', }, { date: 'JUN 07', year: '2025', title: 'Mentorship Intensive', type: 'intensive', location: 'Studio — Loft', desc: 'A full-day intensive for practitioners looking to deepen their teaching practice.', }, { date: 'JUN 21', year: '2025', title: 'Summer Solstice Ceremony', type: 'ceremony', location: 'Outdoor Amphitheatre', desc: 'Mark the longest day with ritual movement, chanting, and shared intention-setting.', }, ]; export default function Events() { return (

what's on

events

Workshops, retreats, and gatherings held throughout the year. Each one is an invitation to show up fully.

{EVENTS.map((ev) => (
{ev.date} {ev.year}
{ev.type}

{ev.title}

{ev.location}

{ev.desc}

))}
); }
